title: Hall of Fame
why_this_song: Hall of Fame by The Script (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Be a champion, be a champion, be a champion, be a champion"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Standing in the hall of fame"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Standing in the hall of fame"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "And the world's gonna know your name"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "And the world's gonna know your name"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And the world's gonna know your name
'Cause you burn with the brightest flame
And the world's gonna know your name
And you'll be on the walls of the hall of fame

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "champion" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "champion" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hall" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Yeah, you could be the greatest
And the world's gonna know your name
On the walls of the hall of fame

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Script one question about "Hall of Fame", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Script sobre "Hall of Fame", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hall of Fame" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hall of Fame" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hall of Fame" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hall of Fame" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
